name: FiveM
description: FiveM GTA V roleplay server template using ich777/fivemserver. The container downloads artifacts automatically, persists server files, and exposes the game, auxiliary and web console ports.

install.script:
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
cfg=/mnt/server/server.cfg
server_port="${SERVER_PORT:-${PORT:-30120}}"
mkdir -p /mnt/server/resources
if [ ! -s "$cfg" ]; then
  cat > "$cfg" <<EOF
endpoint_add_tcp "0.0.0.0:${server_port}"
endpoint_add_udp "0.0.0.0:${server_port}"
start mapmanager
start chat
start spawnmanager
start sessionmanager
start fivem
start hardcap
start rconlog
start scoreboard
start playernames
sv_scriptHookAllowed 1
sets tags "default"
sv_endpointprivacy true
sv_maxclients 32
EOF
else
  if grep -q '^endpoint_add_tcp ' "$cfg"; then
    sed -i "s|^endpoint_add_tcp .*|endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"|" "$cfg"
  else
    sed -i "1i endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"" "$cfg"
  fi
  if grep -q '^endpoint_add_udp ' "$cfg"; then
    sed -i "s|^endpoint_add_udp .*|endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"|" "$cfg"
  else
    sed -i "1i endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"" "$cfg"
  fi
fi
chown -R 99:100 /mnt/server 2>/dev/null || true
chmod -R u+rwX,go+rX /mnt/server
